name: @totalreclaw/totalreclaw
description: End-to-end encrypted, agent-portable memory for OpenClaw and any LLM-agent runtime. XChaCha20-Poly1305 with protobuf v4 + on-chain Memory Taxonomy v1 (claim / preference / directive / commitment / episode / summary).
author: TotalReclaw Team

scripts.test: npx tsx manifest-shape.test.ts && npx tsx config-schema.test.ts && npx tsx llm-profile-reader.test.ts && npx tsx llm-client.test.ts && npx tsx llm-client-retry.test.ts && npx tsx gateway-url.test.ts && npx tsx retype-setscope.test.ts && npx tsx tool-gating.test.ts && npx tsx onboarding-noninteractive.test.ts && npx tsx pair-cli-json.test.ts && npx tsx pair-qr.test.ts && npx tsx pair-remote-client.test.ts && npx tsx qa-bug-report.test.ts && npx tsx nonce-serialization.test.ts && npx tsx phrase-safety-registry.test.ts && npx tsx test_issue_92_onnx_download_ux.test.ts && npx tsx onboard-pair-only.test.ts && npx tsx import-time-smoke.test.ts
